title: Orchard Toys Who's On the Farm? Jigsaw Puzzle, 20-Piece Farm Themed Puzzle, For Kids Age 3+, Includes Poster and Educational Learning Guide
features: Discover Who’s on the Farm in this 20-piece jigsaw puzzle
Includes a poster and a fun learning guide
description: From the manufacturer Product Description Make lots of ‘baas’ and ‘moos’ as you complete this fun, 20-piece jigsaw and discover Who’s on the Farm! Have fun using the enclosed learning guide to encourage further learning! A bright and colourful GIANT poster is also included, with lots to see and talkabout! Promotes discussion such as counting the yellow chicks, spotting the stripy sock and asking what is a baby duck called? This jigsaw puzzle suitable for ages 3+ also helps to develop hand-eye coordination and encourages problem solving skills. Poster Includes a free poster to aid completion of the puzzle and hang up and keep afterward Fun farm scene Lots to see and talk about in this beautifully illustrated farmyard scene jigsaw puzzle. Learning Guide Includes a fun learning, which features different discussion points to talk about once the puzzle has been completed. Can you spot the stripy sock? How many yellow chicks are there? What is a baby duck called? Educational Benefits Develop Hand Eye Coordination Our puzzles promote children’s hand eye coordination as they are required to observe and match specific puzzle pieces to decide which fit together correctly. Develop Understanding of the World Orchard Toys games give children a glimpse of experiences unknown to them, extending their knowledge to environments they won’t be familiar with. These vary from travelling to the moon to prehistoric dinosaurs to animal habitats around the world! Our games can also help teach children about everyday experiences such as going shopping, playing football and cooking food. Encourage Observation Skills Orchard Toys provide a range of games that develop observational skills by encouraging children to compare similarities, notice differences and group items together e.g. by size, colour or shape. About Us Orchard Toys is a British toy company that manufactures educational games, jigsaws and colouring books for children from as young as 18 months. With 50 years heritage, Orchard Toys are leaders in their field and manufactures over 3 million products each year. Orchard Toys design each of their products with support from educational advisors including teachers, nursery practitioners, Early Years professionals and children themselves. With the ethos of ‘Learning Made Fun’, they strive to produce games and jigsaws which are interactive, fun and appealing, whilst also enhancing learning and educational development. All their games and puzzle boards are made from recycled board and paper from sustainable sources.
